title: Gemini Canvas Tutorial: How to Use Google's Most Underrated AI Tool
summary: Gemini Canvas is a feature within Google Gemini that generates working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts from text prompts. The tutorial covers six levels of Canvas functionality from document editing to advanced multi-feature combinations.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master walks through Gemini Canvas, a feature inside Google Gemini that turns text prompts into working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts. The walkthrough is structured across six levels of functionality, starting with document editing and progressing to advanced combinations of multiple features. It demonstrates how prompt engineering and code generation drive each output, showing the range of artifacts Canvas can produce from plain text instructions.
